title: wissadula hernandioides
intro: Wissadula hernandioides, also known as the Horse Apple, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wissadula hernandioides include treating wounds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Wissadula hernandioides are often made into infusions, decoctions, or salves, and are used topically to treat various health issues.
